mapper.sql:
SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ objid, stext, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT objid, stext FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND depth = '2' AND parts = '1' AND TRIM(kostl) IS NULL ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REPLACE(cmmn_cd_nm, '영섬', '영·섬') AS cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu2, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1000' ) B ON
A.objid = B.usr_dfn_vu2 WHERE cmmn_cd_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sort_ordr
SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, usr_dfn_vu1 AS cmmn_cd_nm_en, usr_dfn_vu2 AS elcpwstn_cls_cd, usr_dfn_vu3 AS cnd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' ORDER BY sort_ordr

SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, usr_dfn_vu1, usr_dfn_vu2, usr_dfn_vu3 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1002'
AND SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 2, 2) = '10'
AND SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 2, 2) = '21'
AND SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 2, 2) = '22'
AND SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 2, 1) = '2'
AND SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 2, 2) = '30'

SELECT objid, stext, seqno FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND objid IN ( SELECT upobj FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND objid IN ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN MIN(depth) OVER(PARTITION BY kostl) = depth THEN objid ELSE NULL END FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND TRIM(kostl) IS NOT NULL ) GROUP BY upobj ) AND parts = '1' AND depth = '2'

SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.cmmn_cd AS objid, A.cmmn_cd_nm AS stext, B.cmmn_cd_nm, B.cmmn_cd, B.sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, REPLACE(cmmn_cd_nm, '영·섬', '영섬') AS cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd LIKE 'GHG_1001' AND cmmn_cd != '88888888' /* 위탁 */ ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1, usr_dfn_vu2, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1000' ) B ON
A.cmmn_cd = B.usr_dfn_vu2 WHERE B.cmmn_cd_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY B.sort_ordr

SELECT objid, stext, upobj, kostl, kostx, seqno FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND objid IN ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN MIN(depth) OVER(PARTITION BY kostl) = depth THEN objid ELSE NULL END FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND TRIM(kostl) IS NOT NULL ) AND parts = '1' AND stext NOT LIKE '%처' AND upobj != '50039528' -- 해외

SELECT objid, stext, upobj, kostl, kostx, seqno FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND objid IN ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN MIN(depth) OVER(PARTITION BY kostl) = depth THEN objid ELSE NULL END FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND TRIM(kostl) IS NOT NULL )

CASE WHEN ( SELECT depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = A.edpt_cd GROUP BY objid ) ) IN ('1', '2') THEN A.edpt_nm ELSE ( /* depth3 */ SELECT CASE WHEN AA.depth = '1' OR AA.depth = '2' THEN DECODE(AA.objid, '10690002', '20060557', '50013977', '20060557', '50029610', '10990028', AA.objid) ELSE ( /* depth4 */ SELECT CASE WHEN AAA.depth = '1' OR AAA.depth = '2' THEN DECODE(AAA.objid, '10690002', '20060557', '50013977', '20060557', '50029610', '10990028', AAA.objid) ELSE ( /* depth5 */ SELECT objid FROM ( SELECT objid, stext, upobj, depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = AAA.upobj GROUP BY objid ) ) ) END FROM ( SELECT objid, stext, upobj, depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = AA.upobj GROUP BY objid ) ) AAA ) END FROM ( SELECT objid, stext, upobj, depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = ( SELECT upobj FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = A.edpt_cd GROUP BY objid ) ) GROUP BY objid ) ) AA ) END
HRM_SEARCH_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ objid, kostl, enddt FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE kostx = stext )

CASE WHEN ( SELECT depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, enddt FROM ( SELECT rownum AS no, objid, enddt FROM ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM_SEARCH_LIST WHERE kostl = LPAD(A.requst_dept_cd, 10, '0') GROUP BY objid ORDER BY enddt ) ) WHERE no = 1 ) ) IN ('1', '2') THEN ( SELECT objid FROM ( SELECT rownum AS no, objid, enddt FROM ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM_SEARCH_LIST WHERE kostl = LPAD(A.requst_dept_cd, 10, '0') GROUP BY objid ORDER BY enddt ) ) WHERE no = 1 ) ELSE ( /* depth3 */ SELECT CASE WHEN AA.depth = '1' OR AA.depth = '2' THEN DECODE(AA.objid, '10690002', '20060557', '50013977', '20060557', '50029610', '10990028', AA.objid) ELSE ( /* depth4 */ SELECT CASE WHEN AAA.depth = '1' OR AAA.depth = '2' THEN DECODE(AAA.objid, '10690002', '20060557', '50013977', '20060557', '50029610', '10990028', AAA.objid) ELSE ( /* depth5 */ SELECT objid FROM ( SELECT objid, stext, upobj, depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = AAA.upobj GROUP BY objid ) ) ) END FROM ( SELECT objid, stext, upobj, depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = AA.upobj GROUP BY objid ) ) AAA ) END FROM ( SELECT objid, stext, upobj, depth FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = ( SELECT upobj FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, enddt FROM ( SELECT rownum AS no, objid, enddt FROM ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM_SEARCH_LIST WHERE kostl = LPAD(A.requst_dept_cd, 10, '0') GROUP BY objid ORDER BY enddt ) ) WHERE no = 1 ) ) GROUP BY objid ) ) AA ) END
mapper.select:
/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrieveHRMHQList */ SELECT 'hq' AS cls_cd, '본부' AS cls_cd_nm, objid AS cmmn_cd, stext AS cmmn_cd_nm FROM (
) ORDER BY seqno

/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrieveOasisElctrnDocHRMDsuseDept */ WITH HRM_DEPT AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ objid, stext, depth, upobj, strdt, enddt, kostl, kostx, seqno FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 ) SELECT objid, stext, upobj FROM HRM_DEPT WHERE (objid, strdt) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT objid, MAX(strdt) OVER(PARTITION BY objid) AS strdt FROM HRM_DEPT WHERE stext LIKE '%' || REPLACE(REPLACE( ( SELECT dept_name FROM DBLINKUSR.v_dept_global_ecs WHERE dept_id IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM DBLINKUSR.v_usr_global_ecs WHERE name LIKE '%_폐기%' ) AND dept_id = #{ecsChrgDeptId} ) , '(폐기)', ''), '_폐기', '') || '%' ) AND SYSDATE NOT BETWEEN strdt AND enddt ORDER BY stext

/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrieveElcpwstnList */ SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, usr_dfn_vu1, usr_dfn_vu2, usr_dfn_vu3 FROM (
) ORDER BY cmmn_cd_nm

/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrieveBasinMappingList */ SELECT 'basinMapping' AS cls_cd, '유역공통코드' AS cls_cd_nm, objid, stext, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM (
) ORDER BY sort_ordr

/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrieveAllDeptMappingList */ SELECT cls_cd, cls_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cmmn_cd, upper_cmmn_cd_nm FROM (
) ORDER BY cmmn_cd_nm

/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrieveCmprSttusDeptList */ SELECT A.cls_cd, A.cls_cd_nm, B.cmmn_cd, B.cmmn_cd_nm, B.cmmn_cd_dc, B.upper_cls_cd, B.upper_cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B WHERE A.cls_cd = B.cls_cd AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' ORDER BY cmmn_cd_nm

/* CMMN_SQL_Dao_retrievePrgsSttusList */ SELECT MAX(cls_cd) AS cls_cd, '진행현황' AS cls_cd_nm, REPLACE(SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3), 'P1', 'P0') AS cmmn_cd, REGEXP_SUBSTR(MAX(cmmn_cd_nm), '[^-]+', 1, 1) || REGEXP_SUBSTR(MAX(cmmn_cd_nm), '[^-]+', 1, 2) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MIN(sort_ordr) AS sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000'
AND ( REPLACE(SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3), 'P1', 'P0') LIKE 'P%' OR REPLACE(SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3), 'P1', 'P0') LIKE 'C%' )
AND ( REPLACE(SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3), 'P1', 'P0') LIKE #{cnd} || '%' )
GROUP BY REPLACE(SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3), 'P1', 'P0') ORDER BY sort_ordr
